itb_advice: GW38 is the final gameweek of the 2025/26 season. No price changes are pending or actionable — any movement tonight has zero FPL scoring impact since no future gameweeks exist to benefit from a risen asset. Your bank stands at 0.3m. Do not make transfers purely for ITB inflation; squad value is locked for scoring purposes once GW38 kicks off. The TC chip remains unused — that decision is the only pre-deadline lever that matters, not transfer activity.
summary: End of season confirmed: both likely_rises and likely_falls arrays are empty across all data sources. Transfer velocity signals are dormant — the market has flatlined as expected in the final week. No price-change action is warranted or possible before deadline. Bank of 0.3m is irrelevant to final-GW points. Note: Gabriel (ARS, DEF) is DOUBTFUL and Haaland (MCI, FWD) is UNAVAILABLE on bench — these are availability risks for tonight, not price signals. The sole pre-deadline priority is captain/TC chip allocation.
